🚨 Positive Recall Procedure
Per SOP-05 Section 8.0 · When OOT detected, all parts inspected between last calibration and detection MUST be re-inspected. Customer notification required if shipped. Non-conforming per QP-07.

🔒 Gauge Already Issued - Pending Return
🔒
This gauge/pin set is already issued and pending return.
🚫 Admin / Metrology Manager Override (Use With Caution)
You may override this lock ONLY for legitimate reasons (lost gauge replacement, audit emergency, etc.). Override action is logged in immutable audit trail.
⚠ Override does NOT auto-return the previous issue. You must EITHER: (1) First return the previous issue normally, OR (2) Mark the previous gauge as LOST/DAMAGED in master list before reissuing.
🚚 Send Gauge to Outsource Vendor
🔎 Gauge Selection (Search Master List)
Start typing to find gauges from master list. Only unlocked (not currently issued/outsourced) gauges are shown.
